title: Devon Energy: Free Cash Flow Focus And Growth Are Excellent For Investors

title: Devon Energy Prospers With Rising Energy Prices
text: Based in Oklahoma City, Devon Energy Corp. ( DVN , Financial) is an independent oil and natural gas producer engaged in the exploration, development, and production of energy substances. Founded in 1971, its oil and gas operations are mainly concentrated in the onshore areas of North America, primarily in the United States after the sale of its Canadian business in 2019.
